attributes.description: AWS ECS / ECS dashboard (CPU, memory, Service Connect bytes & connections). Built by cloning [AWS EC2] Nico WIP and rewriting every panel to target metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default with per-service rollups and a saturated/hot/healthy/idle state classification.
attributes.title: [AWS ECS] Nico WIP

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor your AWS ECS / ECS services in real time.
Pick services via the top-bar selector, or click any row in the ECS services table to filter the dashboard by service / cluster / region.
State badges follow the same palette as the Services-by-state donut (red=saturated, amber=hot, green=healthy, grey=idle).
Distinct ECS service names seen over the dashboard time range.

attributes.description: Distinct ECS service names seen over the dashboard time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName, ClusterName = attributes.ClusterName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(ClusterName)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(CONCAT(TO_STRING(ClusterName), "/", TO_STRING(ServiceName))) | KEEP total

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName, ClusterName = attributes.ClusterName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(ClusterName)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(CONCAT(TO_STRING(ClusterName), "/", TO_STRING(ServiceName))) | KEEP total

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName, ClusterName = attributes.ClusterName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(ClusterName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName, ClusterName | EVAL state = CASE(cpu_max > 80 OR mem_max > 80, "saturated", cpu_max > 50 OR mem_max > 50, "hot", cpu_max < 5, "idle", "healthy") | STATS services = COUNT(*) BY state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName, ClusterName = attributes.ClusterName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(ClusterName)) > 0 | STATS c_cpu_avg = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)) / 100.0, c_cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)) / 100.0, c_mem_avg = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) / 100.0, c_mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) / 100.0, c_new_conn = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/NewConnectionCount`, NULL)), c_active_conn = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)), c_processed_bytes_mb = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ProcessedBytes`, NULL)) BY ServiceName, ClusterName, cloud.region | EVAL c_state = CASE(c_cpu_max > 0.8 OR c_mem_max > 0.8, "saturated", c_cpu_max > 0.5 OR c_mem_max > 0.5, "hot", c_cpu_max < 0.05, "idle", "healthy"), c_state_sort = CASE(c_cpu_max > 0.8 OR c_mem_max > 0.8, 1, c_cpu_max > 0.5 OR c_mem_max > 0.5, 2, c_cpu_max < 0.05, 4, 3) | SORT c_state_sort ASC

embeddableConfig.title: ECS services — hexagon map (click an hex for actions)
embeddableConfig.description: One hexagon per ECS (ECS) service, ordered worst-first (CPU- or memory-saturated services appear top-left). Toggle 'Color by' between Status (healthy / cpu-saturated / mem-saturated / idle), CPU (utilization %) or Memory (utilization %). Both gauge metrics support Min / Max / Avg / Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon for a drilldown menu: filter the dashboard, or jump into metrics for that service.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName, ClusterName = attributes.ClusterName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(ClusterName)) > 0 AND CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL) IS NOT NULL | STATS active_conn_avg = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)) | KEEP active_conn_avg

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName, ClusterName = attributes.ClusterName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(ClusterName)) > 0 AND CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL) IS NOT NULL | STATS active_conn_avg = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)) | KEEP active_conn_avg

attributes.description: NewConnectionCount Sum (top) and ActiveConnectionCount Average (bottom, mirrored) per service over time.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName, ClusterName = attributes.ClusterName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(ClusterName)) > 0 AND (CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/NewConnectionCount`, NULL) IS NOT NULL OR CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL) IS NOT NULL) | STATS col_new_conn = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/NewConnectionCount`, NULL)), col_active_conn = -AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), ServiceName, ClusterName | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName, ClusterName = attributes.ClusterName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(ClusterName)) > 0 AND (CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/NewConnectionCount`, NULL) IS NOT NULL OR CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL) IS NOT NULL) | STATS col_new_conn = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/NewConnectionCount`, NULL)), col_active_conn = -AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)) BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), ServiceName, ClusterName | SORT timestamp ASC
